visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit Costco warehouse, a woman wearing a blue beret and a dark off-the-shoulder top stands in front of a massive stack of KitKat boxes. She holds a large display box of KitKat Chunky with Biscoff and a giant chocolate bar prop, smiling and gesturing excitedly. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where two women sit at a table. They are opening a large red KitKat box, laughing and looking at each other. (3) A close-up shot shows hands unwrapping a single KitKat bar from its foil packaging. The bar is placed on a pink heart-shaped plate. (4) Hands use pink-handled scissors to cut the chocolate bar into smaller pieces on the plate, showing the texture. (5) A macro close-up reveals the cross-section of the KitKat bar, showing layers of wafer and a creamy Biscoff filling. (6) Back to the two women at the table; they taste the chocolate pieces. The woman in the beret talks enthusiastically with expressive hand movements, while her companion listens and nods, also tasting the treat. (7) Various colorful, stylized text overlays appear throughout the tasting, highlighting their reactions and descriptions of the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超甜超好吃. [Slogan]: 超巨大KitKat 隱藏脆餅口味. [Subtitle]: KitKat跟蓮花脆餅合作啦. (2) [Subtitle]: 超大一條375元. 有12入. (3) [Subtitle]: 回去試看看值不值得. (4) [Variety]: 哇. [Subtitle]: 這搬起來就很好看誒. (5) [Subtitle]: 我要吃. 這兩個都是我愛的. 我愛KitKat也愛蓮花脆餅. (6) [Subtitle]: 你們知道蓮花脆餅灑成屑屑放在咖啡上超好吃嗎. (7) [Variety]: 哈哈哈哈. (8) [Subtitle]: KitKat跟蓮花脆餅就像我跟你一樣. [Variety]: 完美無瑕. (9) [Subtitle]: 超棒的搭配. [Variety]: 更棒更脆. (10) [Subtitle]: 蓮花餅的肉桂香會隨著巧克力醬一起融出來. [Variety]: 整個大加分. (11) [Subtitle]: 可使超甜真的很甜. [Variety]: 超甜. (12) [Subtitle]: 但他的甜就是本身KitKat的甜跟那個蓮花餅的甜一起加上去. [Variety]: 有夠甜. (13) [Subtitle]: 如果你生理期或心情很不好的時候直接來一個. (14) [Subtitle]: 或者那個比耳說失眠的時候吃一個會直接血糖飆高暈過去. (15) [Subtitle]: 對但它真的好吃我覺得這是KitKat裡面真的很值得嘗試的味道. (16) [Subtitle]: 如果你喜歡收集KitKat的口味我覺得蓮花餅這個非常值得試試看. (17) [Subtitle]: 可是要說一個小缺點就是它每次打開都會有點融化我這整盒都有點融化. 你也是嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male passerby in the background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a blue beret and a black off-the-shoulder top; the other woman has long dark hair and wears a purple top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scenes are in a Costco warehouse with shelves full of bulk products. Later scenes are in a home setting with a white table, a pink heart plate, and various plush toys in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female narration begins with an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM. The voice is high-pitched and excited. (2) Sudden loud bursts of female laughter punctuating the speech. Sound of sliding cardboard as a box is opened. (3) Crisp, high-frequency SFX of foil wrapper crinkling. (4) Percussive 'snip' sound of scissors cutting through the chocolate bar, followed by a dull thud as pieces hit a ceramic plate. (5) Continuous fast-paced dialogue between two women. The BGM remains steady, providing a positive, energetic vibe. (6) Occasional 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects coincide with the appearance of variety-style text overlays on the screen.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Introduction -> Unboxing -> Product Detail -> Taste Test -> Final Evaluation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and promote the giant KitKat x Lotus Biscoff chocolate bar found at Costco. It highlights the size, price, texture (cross-section), and taste profile, focusing on the high sweetness level and the combination of chocolate and cinnamon flavors.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator actively showcases the product, discusses its price, and provides a flavor review with a positive recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media food review with high visual density and enthusiastic delivery, effectively using editing to show product details.
